title: stevia hirsuta var. chortiana
intro: Stevia hirsuta var. chortiana, also known as a variety of the Stevia hirsuta plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is a plant used for its medicinal properties, particularly its sweet-tasting compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Stevia hirsuta var. chortiana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is considered a natural sweetener alternative.
